series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Elderly and Disabled Transit Fare Assistance Program
series_metadata.series_description: Grant criteria, applications, rejected applications, contracts, invoices, and correspondence pertaining to projects submitted for funding under the Ohio Elderly and Disabled Transit Fare Assistance Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital media for 5 years after grant closeout. ; Paper: Retain paper until scanned into electronic format then destroy paper., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
